mapper.select: SELECT * FROM seckill_products WHERE status IN (1, 2) ORDER BY start_time ASC
SELECT * FROM seckill_products ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO seckill_products (product_id, product_name, product_image, seckill_price, stock, origin_stock, start_time, end_time, status, version, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{productId}, #{productName}, #{productImage}, #{seckillPrice}, #{stock}, #{originStock}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status}, #{version}, NOW(), NOW())
